title: Deep Space
description: A mod that allows cross-dimensional travel through a space dimension players can interact with.
body:
**PLEASE NOTE:** While Deep Space is in a stable state for our internal uses, we can not guarantee any functionality outside our specific environments at this stage. 

---

Deep Space allows server administrators to define planets that act as dimensions. Going above a certain Y-level will place a player into space where they can build and travel to other planets in 3D-space rather than a GUI.

This means players can make actual space stations "orbiting" planets and travel cross-dimensionally without breaking immersion. It also creates opportunities for more geopolitical roleplay style conflict.

Also included are angel blocks, a jet suit, and a jet helmet for oxygen.

This mod was developed for [Landfall-830: Digital Deicide](https://modrinth.com/modpack/landfall-830-digital-deicide).
